metadata.title:
FOR BIDS
ON BOTH SAYS


WAOOELL

pages.raw_text:
"The proper way for this city to
go about the solution of the Mon
roe street bridge problem" stated
]. A. L. Waddell, the Kansas City
expert bridge engineer. lis for the
city to call for expert plans of
both steel and concrete and COM
pare them, then make its selec-
tion."


Mr.. Waddell was not In a posi-
ton to discuss any bridge propo-
sition for Monroe street, claiming
that he did not care to unless he
is retained by the city for the pur-
pose. This attitude is easily ex-
planned when Mr.. Waddell's bridge
record is considered. He is reputed
to be the greatest steel bridge man
in the world, and is not In the
habit Of giving bridge information
free.


City Engineer Ralston is still
working on plans for a concrete
structure on Monroe street, but
cannot say just how soon he will
have them ready for submission to
the city council.
